outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed intraday (Positive 0DTE GEX) with underlying structural volatility risk (Negative Monthly GEX).
outlook.summary: Market is in a tactical standoff. 0DTE positive GEX (+0.63B) drives pinning behavior around the 669 Max Pain level, suppressing immediate volatility. However, heavy bearishness in Weekly/Monthly expiries (PCR > 1.8, Smirk Skew) and negative aggregate GEX create a fragile structure. The 660 Put Wall is a massive structural anchor across all timeframes.

0DTE Max Pain level. Spot (671.4) is gravitating towards this level, acting as a powerful magnet for expiry.
Massive Structural Put Wall. Highest OI in all timeframes (24k/63k/164k). The 'floor' of the market structure.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected due to positive total GEX (28.80B). Dealers long gamma will pin price near 6750-6800 zone. Bearish skew (1.45) suggests downside protection in demand but support likely to hold.
outlook.summary: Market positioned in a pinning zone between 6750 Max Pain (0DTE) and 6800 Max Pain (Weekly). Strong positive gamma suppresses volatility. The 6600 RESONANCE level provides structural floor across all expirations. Elevated PCR (1.26-2.37) and bearish skew indicate hedging pressure, but dealer long gamma suggests contained moves. Watch for magnetic pull toward 6750-6800 zone.

outlook.summary: Market pinned below 25000 RESONANCE WALL across all expiries. Bearish skew (1.32-1.21) with MM long gamma suppressing moves. Max Pain cluster 24700-24975 acts as gravitational anchor.
